svg.text: The operating system of the organisation
From scattered apps → to one nervous system → to an organisation that reasons about itself
Not "too many apps." The problem is structural — and invisible until you measure it.
Every team builds auth, UI, push,
As-is today: the employee at the centre of a maze
red dots = pending work nobody sees · the employee must hunt, learn, and remember every system
Express a human need. The right system does the work.
With your permissions. With a receipt. Through whichever surface fits the moment. Without knowing what systems exist.
To-be: one front door · apps reassembled into one landmass
teams keep their terrain · the ocean between them disappears
③ THE SOLUTION — teams build capabilities, not experiences
AOP extracted cross-cutting concerns from classes. Pangaea extracts them from the whole organisation.

g.text: Auth → declared in manifest, OBO broker
Domain logic + data + API + domain agent

svg.text: ④ WHAT'S NOW — deterministic core, light agency, real value
Today Pangaea routes intent → resolves entity → mints scoped token → renders → seals receipt.
Push-driven approvals. Voice summon. Composite views across systems. Discoverability via concept graph.
⑤ WHY AGENTIC-LIGHT (and why that's the point)
It sits on the critical path of trust.
You do NOT want deep, unpredictable
reasoning between a user and a
Invariants keep agency OUT of the
Deep domain reasoning lives with the
The only place reasoning is correct.
Light isn't lesser. You EARN agency by proving trust — layer by layer, above the commit line, never on it.
⑥ THE FUTURE — the platform becomes a reasoner about the whole
A staffing agent knows staffing. A learning agent knows learning. But only the platform sees that an evaluation just
flagged a growth area, that a matching course exists, that an open role needs exactly that skill, that the person's
GitHub activity already shows them moving in that direction, and that their mentor has availability next week.
No domain agent can see this. No human can. The platform stands alone at the intersection of every domain.
Four capabilities that would feel like magic
— no longer walks out the door.
The magic is downside-symmetric. Every capability that feels otherworldly when right feels dystopian when wrong.
You earn the right to be magical by being relentlessly boring and correct underneath. Grow agency only above the commit line.
Each stage earns the next. The deterministic foundation is what makes the magic safe to turn on.
